verify_results.name: and_constmask_eq_zero_i64_original_style
verify_results.body:
declare void @llvm.assume(i1)

define i1 @and_constmask_eq_zero_i64_original_style(i64 %x) {
entry:
  %cond = icmp ugt i64 %x, 65535
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %mask = and i64 %x, -65521
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %mask, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

verify_results.name: and_nonconstmask_eq_zero_two_ranged_i64_highbit
verify_results.body:
declare void @llvm.assume(i1)

define i1 @and_nonconstmask_eq_zero_two_ranged_i64_highbit(i64 %x, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %cx = icmp uge i64 %x, 9223372036854775808
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cx)
  %cy = icmp uge i64 %y, 9223372036854775808
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cy)
  %v = and i64 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %v, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cx)
  %cy = icmp uge i64 %y, 9223372036854775808
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cy)
  %v = and i64 %x, %y
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %v, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
